Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Appearances: Chenoah Konyn, Defendant in Pro per appearing and opposing party. Defendant in Pro Per failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for judgment on the pleading granted without leave to amend. (The Court would entertain a motion for reconsideration, if one is properly noticed.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK)JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235
